common.sentSuccess: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.

footer.tagline: Your trusted partner for Greek Islands travel. Licensed Greek travel agency operating from Kos Port.
footer.licenseLine: Licensed by the Greek Ministry of Tourism · MH.T.E. registered
footer.operatingAs: FerryBee Travel IKE, operating as TravelBeez

hero.subtitle: Ferry tickets, car rentals, hotels, and tours to Kos, Rhodes, Samos, Leros, and Patmos. Trusted by thousands of Turkish travelers.

license.title: Licensed & Registered in Greece
license.description: TravelBeez is a fully licensed Greek travel company registered with the Greek Ministry of Tourism (MH.T.E.). We operate from our office at Kos Port, ensuring you receive authentic local service with full legal protection.
license.locatedBadge: Located Directly at Kos Port Exit

ferryPage.title: Ferry Tickets to Greek Islands
ferryPage.subtitle: Book your ferry crossing from Bodrum, Turgutreis or Marmaris to Kos, Rhodes, Samos and beyond.
ferryPage.noResults: No ferries found for these dates. Try different dates or contact us via WhatsApp.

carRentalPage.title: Car Rental in Kos
carRentalPage.subtitle: Rent a car directly at Kos Port. Same-day pickup, full insurance, English & Turkish support.
carRentalPage.whyRent1Desc: Pick up your car right at Kos Port — no transfer needed.
carRentalPage.whyRent2Desc: Insurance, taxes, and roadside assistance included.
carRentalPage.whyRent3Desc: Turkish-speaking staff available throughout your trip.

toursPage.title: Tours & Experiences
toursPage.subtitle: Curated tours across Kos and the Dodecanese. From sunset cruises to ancient ruins.
toursPage.leadIntro: Tell us what you'd like to experience and we'll prepare a custom quote within 24 hours.

visaPage.title: Visa Support
visaPage.subtitle: Schengen visa consultancy for Turkish travelers. Application guidance, document review, appointment booking.
visaPage.leadIntro: Share your details and a visa specialist will get in touch within one business day.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Questions, custom requests, or anything else — we'd love to hear from you.

packagePickupPage.title: Package Pickup in Kos
packagePickupPage.subtitle: Have items shipped to our Kos warehouse and we'll bring them to you upon arrival. Perfect for shopping, gifts, or essentials.
packagePickupPage.leadIntro: Tell us what you're expecting and your arrival date. We'll send pickup instructions.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
